summary: Frontend testing completed successfully. All 8 requested features verified working: 1) Syntax error fix confirmed - frontend compiles without errors (only ESLint warnings), 2) Landing page loads correctly with NeuralFlows branding, 3) Builder page loads and displays Layer Palette, 4) Templates accordion expands and shows Mini-GPT with NEW badge, 5) Clicking Mini-GPT template loads 8 layers onto canvas, 6) Clicking Train button with Mini-GPT opens Training Panel, 7) Training Panel shows Pre-trained Mini-GPT UI with model specs (~2.1M params, 8 layers, 128 embed dim, 4 heads, 64 seq length, 65 vocab), 8) Text generation section visible with prompt input, temperature/length controls, and generate button.
passed_tests: Test 1: Frontend compiles without errors - PASSED (only ESLint warnings about missing dependencies in useEffect)
Test 2: Landing page loads correctly with title 'NeuralFlows - Visual Neural Network Builder' - PASSED
Test 3: Builder page loads with data-testid='builder-page' - PASSED
Test 4: Layer Palette visible with data-testid='layer-palette' - PASSED
Test 5: Templates accordion found with data-testid='accordion-templates' - PASSED
Test 6: Mini-GPT template found with data-testid='template-mini-gpt' and NEW badge - PASSED
Test 7: Clicking Mini-GPT template loads 8 layers onto canvas (Input, Token Embedding, Positional Encoding, Decoder Block 1, Decoder Block 2, Layer Norm, Dropout, Output) - PASSED
Test 8: Train button opens Training Panel with data-testid='training-panel' - PASSED
Test 9: Pre-trained Mini-GPT UI shows model specs (~2.1M params, 8 Layers, 128 Embed Dim, 4 Attention Heads, 64 chars seq length, 65 chars vocab) - PASSED
Test 10: Training Details shows 50 Epochs, 45.2% Accuracy, 1.82 Loss - PASSED
Test 11: Generate Shakespeare-Style Text section visible with prompt input pre-filled with 'ROMEO: But, soft! what light through yonder window breaks?' - PASSED
Test 12: Temperature (0.80) and Length (200) controls visible - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: TrainingPanel.jsx line 219: useEffect has missing dependencies (initializeMiniGPT, isLoadingMiniGPT, isMiniGPTLoaded) - ESLint warning but not blocking
Mini-GPT uses randomly initialized weights (MOCKED) - actual text generation will produce random-ish text as noted in mocked_apis_list
The Pre-trained Mini-GPT UI correctly displays model specifications and provides text generation interface
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mini-GPT template feature fully working. The template loads 8 layers (Input, Token Embedding, Positional Encoding, 2x Decoder Blocks, Layer Norm, Dropout, Output). Training Panel shows Pre-trained Mini-GPT UI with model specs and text generation section. Note: Mini-GPT uses randomly initialized weights (MOCKED) - actual generation produces random-ish text. The syntax error at line 2617 (unclosed JSX fragment) has been fixed.
